nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 夜鹰科
nodes.summary: 夜鹰科（Caprimulgidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联76种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等76种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-cheeked nightjar
nodes.summary: Rufous-cheeked nightjar（Rufous-cheeked nightjar，学名 Caprimulgus rufigena），分类上属于夜鷹目，并归入夜鹰科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于納塔爾省、河流，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、灌丛。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 納塔爾省
nodes.summary: 納塔爾省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rufous-cheeked nightjar，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 河流
nodes.summary: 河流是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括北美黑鸭、斑頭綠翅鴨、斑頭鴨等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 夜鷹目
nodes.summary: 夜鷹目（Caprimulgiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联83种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等83种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous-cheeked nightjar can be found in Southern Africa year-round, it can be found in Angola, Zambia, Botswana, Mozambique, Namibia, Zimbabwe, and South Africa, although it is absent from the east coast of Southern Africa, Natal, and west Namibia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It can also be found in more open habitats such as the semi-arid acacia shrubland and semi-deserts. For breeding and nesting they prefer dryer areas and avoid rivers, lakes, valleys, as well as moist areas

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its non-breeding grounds are largely in Cameroon, but they have been found in Nigeria, D.R.C, the Republic of the Congo, southern Chad and in the Darfur region of Sudan. It can usually be found in wooded habitats such as the miombo woodland, wooded savanna, and woodland edges and clearings

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It can also be found in more open habitats such as the semi-arid acacia shrubland and semi-deserts. For breeding and nesting they prefer dryer areas and avoid rivers, lakes, valleys, as well as moist areas

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Rufous-cheeked nightjar 属于目 夜鷹目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Rufous-cheeked nightjar 属于科 夜鹰科。
